- **File / Page:** (e.g. `consentflow-backend/app/gates/gate03_inference.py`, `consentflow-frontend/app/page.tsx`)
- **Line number (if known):**

<!-- Provide exact steps so anyone can reproduce the bug -->

2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See the error

<!-- What should have happened? -->

<!-- What actually happened? Paste any error messages below -->

## 🌐 Environment
<!-- Fill in your environment details -->
| Detail | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Browser | (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125) |
| OS | (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04) |
| Device | (e.g. Desktop, iPhone 14, Samsung Galaxy) |
| Screen Size | (e.g. 1920×1080, 375×812 mobile) |
| Docker Version | (e.g. Docker 24.0) |
| Node Version | (e.g. Node 20.11) |
| Python Version | (e.g. Python 3.12) |

<!-- Any other context, related issues, or possible cause you suspect -->

## 🏷️ Suggested Labels
> Write the tags you think apply to this issue based on our contribution guidelines. A maintainer will confirm.
- [ ] `level:beginner` — Simple fix
- [ ] `level:intermediate` — Requires some investigation
- [ ] `level:advanced` — Complex root cause
- [ ] `level:critical` — Breaking / production issue
- [ ] `type:security` — Security-related bug
- [ ] `type:design` — Visual / UI bug
- [ ] `type:performance` — Slowness or memory issue
